name: python-library-course-builder
description: Build source-backed hands-on learning repositories for Python libraries in Simplified Chinese or English.

interface.shortDescription: Build Python courses in Chinese or English
interface.longDescription: Turn a Python library into a cumulative beginner course in Simplified Chinese or English, with lessons, coding labs, CLI and Web grading.
defaultPrompt: Use $building-python-library-courses to create a source-backed course for a Python library or repository.
